content: We can reframe intrinsic curiosity bonuses in ICM/RND curious RL agents as a *tool-based memory operation*, where the agent explicitly invokes write/refresh/forget operations on its episodic memory buffer to actively search for high-uncertainty novel states instead of passively relying on precomputed intrinsic reward signals. This replaces static intrinsic reward calculation with structured, tool-aided memory curation that adapts to the agent’s current exploration goals.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
